name: Yogurt-Herb-Eggplant Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the plain yogurt with the minced garlic.
2. Add the chopped oregano (or dried oregano) and chives (or dried thyme).
3. Season with freshly ground pepper to taste.
4. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Allow the mixture to cool before serving.
